bits.name: ciu_reset
bits.comment: card interface unit reset, active high; auto change to 1'b0 when ciu has been reseted

bits.name: bus_timeout_en
bits.comment: sdio bus occupied timeout enable

bits.name: global_int_enable
bits.comment: global interrupt enable

bits.name: send_irq_resp
bits.comment: send irq response enable, auto change to 1'b0; can be reset by ciu_reset

bits.name: abort_read_data
bits.comment: abort read data to suspend, auto change to 1'b0; can be reset by ciu_reset

bits.name: send_ccsd
bits.comment: send CCSD to CE-ATA device, auto change to 1'b0; can be reset by ciu_reset

bits.name: send_auto_stop_ccsd
bits.comment: send auto stop after CCSD, auto change to 1'b0; can be reset by ciu_reset

bits.name: card_volt_a
bits.comment: card regulator volt-a

bits.name: card_volt_b
bits.comment: card regulator volt-b

bits.name: od_pullup_en
bits.comment: command pullup control, active high

bits.name: bus_arbi_port_en
bits.comment: sdio bus arbitration port enable

bits.name: clear_fifo0_pointers
bits.comment: clear Fifo0 Pointers, active high; auto change to 1'b0 when Fifo Pointers have been cleared.

bits.name: clear_fifo1_pointers
bits.comment: clear Fifo1 Pointers, active high; auto change to 1'b0 when Fifo Pointers have been cleared.

bits.name: card_pwr_en
bits.comment: card power enable

bits.name: sdio_bus_busy
bits.comment: sdio bus is occupied

bits.name: port_index
bits.comment: index of port which is occupying sdio bus. 0: audio channel 1: generic software channel, request by new command 2: generic hardware channel 3: generic software channel, request through apb register directly

bits.name: cmd_fsm_state
bits.comment: command path fsm state

bits.name: data_3
bits.comment: data3 line

bits.name: data0_busy
bits.comment: data0 line busy

bits.name: data_path_busy
bits.comment: data path busy

bits.name: card_write_protect
bits.comment: card write protect

bits.name: card_detect_status
bits.comment: card is detected

bits.name: card_detect
bits.comment: card detect interrupt enable

bits.name: bus_timeout
bits.comment: bus timeout interrupt enable

bits.name: sdio_slv_interrupt
bits.comment: sdio slave interrupt enable

bits.name: sdio_slv_intr_expt_trans_req
bits.comment: sdio slave interrupt except data trans request enable

bits.name: card_detect
bits.comment: card detect masked interrupt status

bits.name: bus_timeout
bits.comment: bus timeout masked interrupt status

bits.name: sdio_slv_interrupt
bits.comment: sdio slave masked interrupt status

bits.name: sdio_slv_intr_expt_trans_req
bits.comment: sdio slave interrupt except data trans request masked status

bits.name: card_detect
bits.comment: card detect raw interrupt status

bits.name: bus_timeout
bits.comment: bus timeout raw interrupt status

bits.name: sdio_slv_interrupt
bits.comment: sdio slave raw interrupt status

bits.name: sdio_slv_intr_expt_trans_req
bits.comment: sdio slave interrupt except data trans request raw status

bits.name: card_detect
bits.comment: write 1: card detect interrupt cleared; write 0: no effect

bits.name: bus_timeout
bits.comment: write 1: bus timeout interrupt cleared; write 0: no effect

bits.name: sdio_slv_interrupt
bits.comment: write 1: sdio slave interrupt cleared; write 0: no effect

bits.name: sdio_slv_intr_expt_trans_req
bits.comment: write 1: sdio slave interrupt except data trans request cleared; write 0: no effect

bits.name: volt_reg
bits.comment: voltage select signal

bits.name: volt_reg_1_2
bits.comment: voltage 1.2v select

bits.name: ddr_reg
bits.comment: ddr mode enable

bits.name: cclk_ctrl_update
bits.comment: cclk control bits update, auto clear to 0

bits.name: cclk_out_inv
bits.comment: card output clock invert enable

bits.name: cclk_smpl_inv
bits.comment: card sample clock invert enable

bits.name: sclk_div
bits.comment: serial clock divider value. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: sclk_enable
bits.comment: serial card clock enable. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: sclk_low_power
bits.comment: serial clock low power control. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: cmd_4wire_global_en
bits.comment: Global enable for cmd path using 4 wire

bits.name: dp_crc_check_disable
bits.comment: Disable Data Path Crc16 check

bits.name: ncc_cnt_th
bits.comment: threshold for ncc counter

bits.name: low_pwr_cntr_th
bits.comment: low power counter threshold, minimum 7, write is ignored if less than 7

bits.name: dp_dummy_clk_num
bits.comment: dummy clock num after data tx endbit when crc16 check disabled

bits.name: enable_shift
bits.comment: card clock out eables shift. 2'b00/2'b11: Default Enables (-ve edge to -ve edge) -5 to 5, 15 to 25,35 to 45 etc 2'b01: Enables from +ve edge to +ve edge 0 to 10,20 to 30, 40 to 50 2'b10: Shifted enables (-ve edge to -ve edge) 5 to 15, 25 to 35,45 to 55 etc.

bits.name: resp_tmout_cnt
bits.comment: response timeout count. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: data_tmout_cnt
bits.comment: data timeout count. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: card_width_lo
bits.comment: card bus width, 0:1-wire, 1: 4-wire. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: card_type
bits.comment: card type, 0: not ddr 8-wire mode, 1: ddr 8-wire mode. Only can be configured when no cmd pending

bits.name: card_reset_n
bits.comment: card hard ware reset signal, active low

bits.name: card_rd_threshold_en
bits.comment: card read threshold enable

bits.name: busy_clr_int_enable
bits.comment: busy clear inerrupt enable

bits.name: card_rd_threshold_size
bits.comment: card read threshold

bits.name: back_end_power
bits.comment: back end power for application on the card

bits.name: half_start_bit
bits.comment: 0.5 start/end bit enable

bits.name: bus_timout_threshold
bits.comment: bus timeout threshold

bits.name: debounce_count
bits.comment: debounce count

bits.name: uid
bits.comment: user id

bits.name: version_id
bits.comment: sd version id

bits.name: card_type
bits.comment: card type. 1: SD/MMC/CE-ATA, 0: MMC-VER3.3 ONLY

bits.name: num_of_cards
bits.comment: number of cards, 0: only 1 cards, 1: 2 cards, etc

bits.name: ahbslv_bus_type
bits.comment: ahb slave bus type, 0: apb, 1: ahb

bits.name: ahbslv_data_width
bits.comment: ahb slave bus data width, 0: 16bit 1: 32bit 2: 64bit

bits.name: ahbslv_addr_width
bits.comment: ahb slave bus addr width - 1

bits.name: dma_interface
bits.comment: dma interface, 0: none, 1:dw-dma, 2: generic-dma, 3: non-dw-dma

bits.name: fifo_ram_inside
bits.comment: fifo ram is instantiated inside or outside the core. 0: outside, 1:inside

bits.name: implement_hold_reg
bits.comment: Instantiates the card hold-time registers

bits.name: set_clk_false_path
bits.comment: set false path between "clk to cclk_in", "cclk_in to clk"

bits.name: num_clk_dividers
bits.comment: number of clock dividers, 0: 1 divider, 1: 2 dividers, etc

bits.name: area_optimized
bits.comment: area optimized

bits.name: m_addr_width
bits.comment: width of master address bus for idmac. 0: 32bit, 1:64bit

bits.name: bus_timeut_cur_cnt
bits.comment: sdio bus timeout coutner current value

bits.name: ge_sw_dma_reset
bits.comment: generic software channel dma reset, actiove high; auto clear to 1'b0

bits.name: ge_sw_read_wait
bits.comment: read wait enable, used when generic software channel occupy the sdio bus. Can be reset by ciu_reset

bits.name: ge_sw_use_internal_dmac
bits.comment: use internal dmac enable, active high; used when generic software channel occupy the sdio bus.

bits.name: sw_direct_req_bus
bits.comment: write 1: requests sdio bus, write 0: no effect; read 1: sofware is requesting bus but not granted. read 0: software is granted bus if request before, software not use bus if not.

bits.name: sw_direct_release_bus
bits.comment: release sdio bus when sdio bus has been occpied by software through "sw_req_bus" register directly

bits.name: ge_sw_fifo_empty
bits.comment: fifo empty flag, valid when generic software channel occupy the sdio bus

bits.name: ge_sw_fifo_full
bits.comment: fifo full flag, valid when generic software channel occupy the sdio bus

bits.name: ge_sw_response_index
bits.comment: generic software channel response index

bits.name: ge_sw_fifo_count
bits.comment: fifo_count, valid when generic software channel occupy the sdio bus. Fifo0 is used by generic software channel. Maximum is 32

bits.name: ge_sw_busy
bits.comment: generic software channel busy

bits.name: audio_resp_index_latch
bits.comment: audio response index when response err occurs

bits.name: audio_resp
bits.comment: audio response

bits.name: audio_resp_latch
bits.comment: audio response index when response err occurs

bits.name: ge_hw_dma_reset
bits.comment: generic hardware channel dma ctrl reset, active high; auto clear to 0

bits.name: ge_hw_read_wait
bits.comment: generic hardware channel read wait

bits.name: ge_hw_enable
bits.comment: generic hardware channel enable

bits.name: ge_hw_fifo_full
bits.comment: generic hardware channel fifo full flag

bits.name: ge_hw_fifo_empty
bits.comment: generic hardware channel fifo empty flag

bits.name: ge_hw_main_fsm_state
bits.comment: current state of generic hardware channel main fsm

bits.name: ge_hw_sub_fsm_state
bits.comment: current state of generic hardware channel sub fsm

bits.name: ge_hw_main_fsm_state_latch
bits.comment: latched state of generic hardware channel main fsm when last abnormal interrupt generated

bits.name: auido_sub_fsm_state_latch
bits.comment: latched state of generic hardware channel sub fsm when last abnormal interrupt generated

bits.name: ge_hw_response_err

bits.name: ge_hw_slv_chns_en_set
bits.comment: asdio slv func1 dma channels enable set. Up to support 32 channels

bits.name: ge_hw_slv_chns_disable_set
bits.comment: asdio slv func1 dma channels disable set. Up to support 32 channels

bits.name: DMA_PAUSE
bits.comment: Active High, pause all the channels. Note: If "DMA_PAUSE" asserted active when the DMA is busy, DMA would finish the current fragment before enter Pause State.

bits.name: DMA_PAUSE_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA Pause status. 0 : In active state. 1 : In Pause state.

bits.name: DMA_FRAG_WAIT
bits.comment: Wait Time between two successive Fragment. With unit of AHB clock.

bits.name: O_ENDIAN
bits.comment: DMA output endian, 0- little endian 1- big endian

bits.name: REQ_PEND_EN[31:0]
bits.comment: Requests Pending Enable. Acitve high, enable DMA_REQ[31:0] to wakeup DMA, when MCU deep sleep;

bits.name: REQ_PEND_EN[63:32]
bits.comment: Requests Pending Enable. Acitve high, enable DMA_REQ[63:32] to wakeup DMA, when MCU deep sleep;

bits.name: DMA_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Interrupt Raw Status. 0 : No Interrupt need to be served. 1 : Interrupt need to be served.

bits.name: DMA_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Interrupt Mask Status. 0 : No Interrupt need to be served. 1 : Interrupt need to be served.

bits.name: DMA_REQ_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Request Status. 0 : No Request need to be served. 1 : Request need to be served.

bits.name: DMA_EN_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Enable Status. 0 : Channel Not Enabled. 1 : Channel Enabled.

bits.name: DEST_FSM_STATUS
bits.comment: Destination Side FSM status. 4'd0: IDLE 4'd1: calculate burst parameter 4'd2: calculate data number of burst 4'd3: wait enough data buffer space for write burst 4'd4: start write burst 4'd5: write burst execute 4'd6: wait fragment done or limit outstanding number 4'd7: fragment write done

bits.name: SRC_FSM_STATUS
bits.comment: Source Side FSM status. 4'd0: IDLE 4'd1: calculate burst parameter 4'd2: calculate data number of burst 4'd3: wait enough data buffer space for read burst 4'd4: start read burst 4'd5: read burst execute 4'd6: wait fragment done or limit outstanding number 4'd7: fragment read done

bits.name: MAIN_FSM_STATUS
bits.comment: MAIN FSM status. 5'd0: IDLE 5'd1: load link list pointer 5'd2: load link list source and dest address 5'd3: load link list fragment and block length 5'd4: load link list transaction length and src/dest transfer step 5'd5: load link list wrap_ptr and wrap_to 5'd6: load full mode source and dest address 5'd7: load full mode fragment and block length 5'd8: load full mode transaction length and src/dest transfer step 5'd9: load full mode wrap_ptr and wrap_to 5'd10: update block length 5'd11: update transaction length 5'd12: fragment execute 5'd13: load list pointer and use src/dest fragment step 5'd14: load src/dest block step 5'd15: load link list high 4bits pointer and src/dest fragment step 5'd16: load src/dest block step 5'd17: transaction or link list done 5'd18: update wrap info.

bits.name: HREADY_DMAR
bits.comment: dma read hready

bits.name: HREADY_DMAW
bits.comment: dma write hready

bits.name: DMA_BUSY
bits.comment: DMA Busy Status.

bits.name: CHN_ARB_SEL
bits.comment: Channel Arbitrator Selection Status;

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE
bits.comment: Channel Pause Enable. 0 : Channel in active mode. 1 : Channel pause. Active high, only pause the channel. If the CHN_PAUSE asserted when the channel is busy, it should be paused after the current fragment finished.

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Pause status.

bits.name: CHN_REQ
bits.comment: Channel Software DMA Request.

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_MODE
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Request Mode: 1- level, 0- edge

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_LEVEL
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Valid Level: 1- high, 0- low

bits.name: CHN_EN
bits.comment: Software Channel Enable: 0 : Disable the channel. 1 : Enable the channel.

bits.name: CHN_AUTO_CLOSE_EN
bits.comment: Channel AutoClose Enable: 0 : Channel does not auto close. 1 : Channel auto close.

bits.name: LLIST_EN
bits.comment: Link list Enable, only available for full DMA channel. 0 : Disable the link list. 1 : Enable the link list.

bits.name: FRAG_LEN_SEL
bits.comment: 2'b00 : frag length is configured by dmac internal register. 2'b01 : frag length is fetched from external. others : frag length is confirmed through compare dmac internal frag length and external length.

bits.name: LLIST_CFG_VALID
bits.comment: If "LLIST_EN" asserted, active high indicates Link list configure valid. 0 : Link list configure in-valid. DMA controller need obtain link list configure information by link list pointer. 1 : link list configure information valid. DMA controller would continue to complete the node and clear this bit. Note: Strongly recommend to observe only. Carefully writing to this bit, which may cause DMA crashed. If had to do so, pause this channel before changing.

bits.name: CHN_PRIORITY
bits.comment: Channel Request Priority. Four level of Priority supported as list : 2'b00 : Lowest priority. 2'b01 : Secondary lowest priority. 2'b10 : Tertiary lowest priority. 2'b11 : Highest priority.

bits.name: AHB_BURST_SEL
ERR_TYPE_STATUS
CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_EN
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_EN
bits.comment: Block done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_EN
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt enable

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_EN
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Fragment done Raw interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Block done interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link List interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error raw interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Fragment Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Block Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link list Masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Block done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt clear

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_ADDR
bits.comment: Channel Source/Destination Address, Rx: Destination Address, Tx: Source Address

bits.name: FRG_LEN
bits.comment: Fragment Length, with byte unit. Max 512 bytes

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_INT_EN
bits.comment: Interrupt global enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_COUNT_EN
bits.comment: Counter enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_END
bits.comment: Link list end flag. Active only when "LLIST_EN" asserted.

bits.name: ADDR_FIX_EN
bits.comment: Address Fix Enable: 0 : Disable Address Fix mode. 1 : Enable Address Fix mode. The source address is fixed in Rx channel; the destination address is fixed in Tx channel. Active High would make address fixed within the fragment

bits.name: REQ_MODE
SWT_MODE
DEST_SIZE
bits.comment: Destination AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: SRC_SIZE
bits.comment: Source AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: BLK_LEN
bits.comment: Block Length, with byte unit. Max 1M-1 bytes

bits.name: LLIST_PTR
bits.comment: Link List pointer. Must DWord align.

bits.comment: Channel Pause Enable. 0 : Channel in active mode. 1 : Channel pause. Active high, only pause the channel. If the CHN_PAUSE asserted when the channel is busy, it should be paused after the current fragment finished.

ERR_TYPE_STATUS
CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_EN
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_EN
bits.comment: Block done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_EN
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt enable

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_EN
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Fragment done Raw interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Block done interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link List interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error raw interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Fragment Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Block Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link list Masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Block done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt clear

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_ADDR
bits.comment: Channel Source/Destination Address, Rx: Destination Address, Tx: Source Address

bits.name: FRG_LEN
bits.comment: Fragment Length, with byte unit. Max 512 bytes

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_INT_EN
bits.comment: Interrupt global enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_COUNT_EN
bits.comment: Counter enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_END
bits.comment: Link list end flag. Active only when "LLIST_EN" asserted.

bits.name: ADDR_FIX_EN
bits.comment: Address Fix Enable: 0 : Disable Address Fix mode. 1 : Enable Address Fix mode. The source address is fixed in Rx channel; the destination address is fixed in Tx channel. Active High would make address fixed within the fragment

bits.name: REQ_MODE
SWT_MODE
DEST_SIZE
bits.comment: Destination AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: SRC_SIZE
bits.comment: Source AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: BLK_LEN
bits.comment: Block Length, with byte unit. Max 1M-1 bytes

bits.name: LLIST_PTR
bits.comment: Link List pointer. Must DWord align.

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE
bits.comment: Channel Pause Enable. 0 : Channel in active mode. 1 : Channel pause. Active high, only pause the channel. If the CHN_PAUSE asserted when the channel is busy, it should be paused after the current fragment finished.

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Pause status.

bits.name: CHN_REQ
bits.comment: Channel Software DMA Request.

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_MODE
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Request Mode: 1- level, 0- edge

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_LEVEL
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Valid Level: 1- high, 0- low

bits.name: CHN_EN
bits.comment: Software Channel Enable: 0 : Disable the channel. 1 : Enable the channel.

bits.name: CHN_AUTO_CLOSE_EN
bits.comment: Channel AutoClose Enable: 0 : Channel does not auto close. 1 : Channel auto close.

bits.name: LLIST_EN
bits.comment: Link list Enable, only available for full DMA channel. 0 : Disable the link list. 1 : Enable the link list.

bits.name: FRAG_LEN_SEL
bits.comment: 2'b00 : frag length is configured by dmac internal register. 2'b01 : frag length is fetched from external. others : frag length is confirmed through compare dmac internal frag length and external length.

bits.name: LLIST_CFG_VALID
bits.comment: If "LLIST_EN" asserted, active high indicates Link list configure valid. 0 : Link list configure in-valid. DMA controller need obtain link list configure information by link list pointer. 1 : link list configure information valid. DMA controller would continue to complete the node and clear this bit. Note: Strongly recommend to observe only. Carefully writing to this bit, which may cause DMA crashed. If had to do so, pause this channel before changing.

bits.name: CHN_PRIORITY
bits.comment: Channel Request Priority. Four level of Priority supported as list : 2'b00 : Lowest priority. 2'b01 : Secondary lowest priority. 2'b10 : Tertiary lowest priority. 2'b11 : Highest priority.

bits.name: LLIST_EN
bits.comment: Link list Enable, only available for full DMA channel. 0 : Disable the link list. 1 : Enable the link list.

bits.name: FRAG_LEN_SEL
bits.comment: 2'b00 : frag length is configured by dmac internal register. 2'b01 : frag length is fetched from external. others : frag length is confirmed through compare dmac internal frag length and external length.

bits.name: LLIST_CFG_VALID
bits.comment: If "LLIST_EN" asserted, active high indicates Link list configure valid. 0 : Link list configure in-valid. DMA controller need obtain link list configure information by link list pointer. 1 : link list configure information valid. DMA controller would continue to complete the node and clear this bit. Note: Strongly recommend to observe only. Carefully writing to this bit, which may cause DMA crashed. If had to do so, pause this channel before changing.

bits.name: CHN_PRIORITY
bits.comment: Channel Request Priority. Four level of Priority supported as list : 2'b00 : Lowest priority. 2'b01 : Secondary lowest priority. 2'b10 : Tertiary lowest priority. 2'b11 : Highest priority.

bits.name: AHB_BURST_SEL
ERR_TYPE_STATUS
CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_EN
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt enable.

bits.comment: Block done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_EN
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt enable

bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt enable.

bits.comment: Fragment done Raw interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Block done interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link List interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error raw interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Fragment Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Block Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link list Masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Block done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt clear

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_ADDR
bits.comment: Channel Source/Destination Address, Rx: Destination Address, Tx: Source Address

bits.name: FRG_LEN
bits.comment: Fragment Length, with byte unit. Max 512 bytes

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_INT_EN
bits.comment: Interrupt global enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_COUNT_EN
bits.comment: Counter enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_END
bits.comment: Link list end flag. Active only when "LLIST_EN" asserted.

bits.name: ADDR_FIX_EN
bits.comment: Address Fix Enable: 0 : Disable Address Fix mode. 1 : Enable Address Fix mode. The source address is fixed in Rx channel; the destination address is fixed in Tx channel. Active High would make address fixed within the fragment

bits.name: REQ_MODE
SWT_MODE
DEST_SIZE
bits.comment: Destination AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: SRC_SIZE
bits.comment: Source AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: BLK_LEN
bits.comment: Block Length, with byte unit. Max 1M-1 bytes

bits.name: LLIST_PTR
bits.comment: Link List pointer. Must DWord align.

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE
bits.comment: Channel Pause Enable. 0 : Channel in active mode. 1 : Channel pause. Active high, only pause the channel. If the CHN_PAUSE asserted when the channel is busy, it should be paused after the current fragment finished.

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Pause status.

bits.name: CHN_REQ
bits.comment: Channel Software DMA Request.

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_MODE
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Request Mode: 1- level, 0- edge

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_LEVEL
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Valid Level: 1- high, 0- low

bits.name: CHN_EN
bits.comment: Software Channel Enable: 0 : Disable the channel. 1 : Enable the channel.

bits.name: CHN_AUTO_CLOSE_EN
bits.comment: Channel AutoClose Enable: 0 : Channel does not auto close. 1 : Channel auto close.

bits.name: LLIST_EN
bits.comment: Link list Enable, only available for full DMA channel. 0 : Disable the link list. 1 : Enable the link list.

bits.name: FRAG_LEN_SEL
bits.comment: 2'b00 : frag length is configured by dmac internal register. 2'b01 : frag length is fetched from external. others : frag length is confirmed through compare dmac internal frag length and external length.

bits.name: LLIST_CFG_VALID

Note: Strongly recommend to observe only. Carefully writing to this bit, which may cause DMA crashed. If had to do so, pause this channel before changing.

bits.comment: Channel Request Priority. Four level of Priority supported as list : 2'b00 : Lowest priority. 2'b01 : Secondary lowest priority. 2'b10 : Tertiary lowest priority. 2'b11 : Highest priority.
